message:
fix(polyfills): fix timer null handling, util.inspect, and btoa encoding

- clearTimeout/clearInterval: handle null/undefined gracefully (Node.js behavior)
- util.inspect: return proper strings for undefined and function values
- btoa: decode UTF-8 to Latin-1 code points before base64 encoding
  (fixes SHA-256 base64 output corruption)

These fixes address test failures in timer, util, and crypto modules.
